race.comment: AYSERA KIZ (1) Came in 2nd last time at the track. Mehmet Akyavuz takes the reins today. Exhibiting good form since resuming from a spell. Can win. RAZKAN (2) Disappointing run when 4th last time around here. GöKhan Kocakaya is an advantage. Has been a model of consistency this campaign. Worth consideration. BOLGA (10) Came in 10th last time at the track but promising career start. Muhammed Mi̇R Bi̇Lgi̇N and Murat Akkiliç show promise as a combination. Performing impressively this preparation. Can give this a shake. SEÇILKIZ (7) Lacked competitiveness when 4th last run at Antalya but will be well suited at the trip. Jockey Ayhan KurşUn and trainer ş Aydemi̇R show promise as a duo. Has the ability to take this out.
